message:
chore(perf-artifacts): strip trailing newline from unistr-stream proof files

Pre-commit hook normalised the trailing newline on the two perf-proof
fixtures captured alongside 14219105:

- tests/artifacts/perf/20260429T0220Z-icybluff-unistr-stream/baseline.txt
- tests/artifacts/perf/20260429T0220Z-icybluff-unistr-stream/candidate.txt

Both files previously had an extra blank line after the final
`test result:` line. The hook removes the duplicate trailing
newline so EOF coincides with the last meaningful line, matching
the convention used by every other perf-artifact pair under
tests/artifacts/perf/. No content change beyond the EOL — the
recorded `unistr_text_args invocations=500000 ...` numbers stay
intact and the commit's measurement remains comparable to the
candidate run.

files.patch:
@@ -49,4 +49,3 @@ unistr_text_args invocations=500000 repeats=7 plain_best_ns=156162140 escaped_be
 test builtins::tests::perf_unistr_text_args ... ok
 
 test result: ok. 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 373 filtered out; finished in 2.84s
-

@@ -49,4 +49,3 @@ unistr_text_args invocations=500000 repeats=7 plain_best_ns=59928118 escaped_bes
 test builtins::tests::perf_unistr_text_args ... ok
 
 test result: ok. 1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 373 filtered out; finished in 1.23s
